# task-status

Single source of truth for `TaskStatus` display metadata. All plugins that render a task's status — as an icon, a colored badge, or a graph node — import from here instead of defining their own color/label maps.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Single source of truth for TaskStatus display metadata — icon, label, icon color, and badge style.
- Web:
  - Uses: `primitives/css/badge.Badge`, `primitives/css/status-dot.StatusDot`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
  - Exports: Values: `STATUS_META`, `StatusBadge`, `StatusIcon`, `StatusSignal`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/tool-call/add-task`, `tasks/task-graph`, `tasks/task-header`, `tasks/task-list/recent`, `tasks/task-list/tree`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
